DISCOVERY, 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PERMISSION TO ENTER PROPERTY FOR INSPECTION AND PHOTOGRAPHING, AND TO BRING A WITNESS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AS THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS INADEQUATE. C.C.P. SECTION 1013A PROVIDES THAT THE AFFIDAVIT OF SERVICE MUST SHOW THAT THE PERSON MAKING THE SERVICE IS NOT A PARTY TO THE ACTION. THE AFFIDAVIT OF SERVICE SHOWS THAT PLAINTIFF MADE SERVICE OF THE MOTION. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
